name: Vegetarian Lasagna
recipeIngredient: Dried Basil, Crushed (1 ½ teaspoons) or Oregano (1 teaspoon)
Low-fat Ricotta or Cottage Cheese (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles and frozen chopped broccoli separately according to package directions; drain well. Set aside.
2. For the sauce, cut canned tomatoes into chunks. In a large saucepan, stir together undrained tomatoes, tomato sauce, celery, green/sweet red pepper, basil (or oregano), bay leaves, and garlic. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20-25 minutes or until thick, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove bay leaves from the sauce.
4. In a bowl, stir together egg, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, and salt (¼ teaspoon) until well combined. Stir in the broccoli mixture.
5. Spread about half of the sauce in a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Layer with half of the noodles and half of the broccoli mixture.
6. Repeat layers with remaining sauce, noodles, and broccoli mixture, finishing with sauce on top.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25 minutes; sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese. Bake an additional 5 minutes or until heated through. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
